series_metadata.series_description: Records generated to document, track and resolve user problems, account requests, equipment use and technical assistance; inventory/equipment assignment and tracking; compile monthly and annual statistics; planning reference; management analysis; collects information on the use of computer equipment for program delivery and security. (Reference: DAS IT-AS-02)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: one (1) state fiscal year year generated. when deemed have no administrative value. ; Electronic: one (1) state fiscal year year generated. when deemed have no administrative value
